steps.title: Identify what follows the blank
steps.content: After the blank is a description that shows how the painting uses the spectrum: a swimmer with rainbow goggles splashing through rainbow water. This description elaborates on the preceding statement about using the spectrum.

steps.title: Choose punctuation for elaboration
steps.content:
A colon introduces an elaboration or example of a preceding statement.

The description of the swimmer elaborates on how the painting achieves its goal of using the spectrum, making the colon the correct choice.

Options A, C, and D either lack proper punctuation or use while to signal a temporal relationship rather than elaboration.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
